Name: insert_user_departments
SQL: WITH check_nested_department_0 AS (SELECT * FROM (SELECT $1::uuid AS "id", $2::text AS "name", $3::text AS "description", $4::numeric AS "budget") AS data WHERE true), nested_department_0 AS (INSERT INTO "public"."departments" ("id", "name", "description", "budget") SELECT check_nested_department_0."id", check_nested_department_0."name", check_nested_department_0."description", check_nested_department_0."budget" FROM check_nested_department_0 RETURNING *), check_nested_employees_0 AS (SELECT * FROM (SELECT $5::uuid AS "user_id", $6::text AS "role", nested_department_0."id" AS "department_id" FROM nested_department_0) AS data WHERE true), nested_employees_0 AS (INSERT INTO "public"."user_departments" ("user_id", "role", "department_id") SELECT check_nested_employees_0."user_id", check_nested_employees_0."role", nested_department_0."id" FROM check_nested_employees_0, nested_department_0 RETURNING *), check_nested_department_1 AS (SELECT * FROM (SELECT $7::uuid AS "id", $8::text AS "name", $9::text AS "description", $10::numeric AS "budget") AS data WHERE true), nested_department_1 AS (INSERT INTO "public"."departments" ("id", "name", "description", "budget") SELECT check_nested_department_1."id", check_nested_department_1."name", check_nested_department_1."description", check_nested_department_1."budget" FROM check_nested_department_1 RETURNING *), check_nested_employees_1 AS (SELECT * FROM (SELECT $11::uuid AS "user_id", $12::text AS "role", nested_department_1."id" AS "department_id" FROM nested_department_1) AS data WHERE true), nested_employees_1 AS (INSERT INTO "public"."user_departments" ("user_id", "role", "department_id") SELECT check_nested_employees_1."user_id", check_nested_employees_1."role", nested_department_1."id" FROM check_nested_employees_1, nested_department_1 RETURNING *), check_mutation_result_0 AS (SELECT * FROM (SELECT $13::uuid AS "user_id", $14::text AS "role", nested_department_0."id" AS "department_id" FROM nested_department_0) AS data WHERE true), mutation_result_0 AS (INSERT INTO "public"."user_departments" ("user_id", "role", "department_id") SELECT check_mutation_result_0."user_id", check_mutation_result_0."role", nested_department_0."id" FROM check_mutation_result_0, nested_department_0 RETURNING *), check_mutation_result_1 AS (SELECT * FROM (SELECT $15::uuid AS "user_id", $16::text AS "role", nested_department_1."id" AS "department_id" FROM nested_department_1) AS data WHERE true), mutation_result_1 AS (INSERT INTO "public"."user_departments" ("user_id", "role", "department_id") SELECT check_mutation_result_1."user_id", check_mutation_result_1."role", nested_department_1."id" FROM check_mutation_result_1, nested_department_1 RETURNING *), mutation_result AS (SELECT mutation_result_0."user_id", mutation_result_0."department_id", mutation_result_0."role", mutation_result_0."joined_at", mutation_result_0."is_active" FROM mutation_result_0 UNION ALL SELECT mutation_result_1."user_id", mutation_result_1."department_id", mutation_result_1."role", mutation_result_1."joined_at", mutation_result_1."is_active" FROM mutation_result_1) SELECT json_build_object('affected_rows', ((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mutation_result) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM nested_department_0) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM nested_department_1) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM nested_employees_0) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM nested_employees_1)), 'returning', (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(row_to_json("_e")), '[]'::json) FROM (SELECT mutation_result."user_id" AS "user_id", mutation_result."department_id" AS "department_id", mutation_result."role" AS "role", "mutation_result.r.department"."department" AS "department" FROM mutation_result LEFT OUTER JOIN LATERAL (WITH "mutation_result.r.department.base" AS (SELECT * FROM (SELECT nested_department_0."id" AS "id", nested_department_0."name" AS "name", nested_department_0."description" AS "description", nested_department_0."budget" AS "budget", nested_department_0."has_high_budget" AS "has_high_budget", nested_department_0."created_at" AS "created_at", nested_department_0."updated_at" AS "updated_at" FROM nested_department_0 UNION ALL SELECT nested_department_1."id" AS "id", nested_department_1."name" AS "name", nested_department_1."description" AS "description", nested_department_1."budget" AS "budget", nested_department_1."has_high_budget" AS "has_high_budget", nested_department_1."created_at" AS "created_at", nested_department_1."updated_at" AS "updated_at" FROM nested_department_1 UNION ALL SELECT "public"."departments"."id" AS "id", "public"."departments"."name" AS "name", "public"."departments"."description" AS "description", "public"."departments"."budget" AS "budget", "public"."departments"."has_high_budget" AS "has_high_budget", "public"."departments"."created_at" AS "created_at", "public"."departments"."updated_at" AS "updated_at" FROM "public"."departments" WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM (SELECT nested_department_0."id" AS "id" FROM nested_department_0 UNION ALL SELECT nested_department_1."id" AS "id" FROM nested_department_1) AS "mutation_result.r.department.source.nested_keys" WHERE "mutation_result.r.department.source.nested_keys"."id" = "public"."departments"."id")) AS "mutation_result.r.department.source" WHERE "mutation_result"."department_id" = "id" LIMIT 1) SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "mutation_result.r.department.base"."id" AS "id", "mutation_result.r.department.base"."name" AS "name", "mutation_result.r.department.r.employees"."employees" AS "employees") AS "_e")) AS "department" FROM "mutation_result.r.department.base" LEFT OUTER JOIN LATERAL (SELECT coalesce(json_agg("mutation_result.r.department.r.employees"), '[]') AS "employees" FROM (WITH "mutation_result.r.department.r.employees.base" AS (SELECT * FROM (SELECT nested_employees_0."user_id" AS "user_id", nested_employees_0."department_id" AS "department_id", nested_employees_0."role" AS "role", nested_employees_0."joined_at" AS "joined_at", nested_employees_0."is_active" AS "is_active" FROM nested_employees_0 UNION ALL SELECT nested_employees_1."user_id" AS "user_id", nested_employees_1."department_id" AS "department_id", nested_employees_1."role" AS "role", nested_employees_1."joined_at" AS "joined_at", nested_employees_1."is_active" AS "is_active" FROM nested_employees_1 UNION ALL SELECT "public"."user_departments"."user_id" AS "user_id", "public"."user_departments"."department_id" AS "department_id", "public"."user_departments"."role" AS "role", "public"."user_departments"."joined_at" AS "joined_at", "public"."user_departments"."is_active" AS "is_active" FROM "public"."user_departments" WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM (SELECT nested_employees_0."user_id" AS "user_id", nested_employees_0."department_id" AS "department_id" FROM nested_employees_0 UNION ALL SELECT nested_employees_1."user_id" AS "user_id", nested_employees_1."department_id" AS "department_id" FROM nested_employees_1) AS "mutation_result.r.department.r.employees.source.nested_keys" WHERE "mutation_result.r.department.r.employees.source.nested_keys"."user_id" = "public"."user_departments"."user_id" AND "mutation_result.r.department.r.employees.source.nested_keys"."department_id" = "public"."user_departments"."department_id")) AS "mutation_result.r.department.r.employees.source" WHERE "department_id" = "mutation_result.r.department.base"."id") SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "mutation_result.r.department.r.employees.base"."user_id" AS "user_id", "mutation_result.r.department.r.employees.base"."role" AS "role") AS "_e")) AS "mutation_result.r.department.r.employees" FROM "mutation_result.r.department.r.employees.base") AS "mutation_result.r.department.r.employees") AS "mutation_result.r.department.r.employees" ON ('true')) AS "mutation_result.r.department" ON ('true') WHERE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM nested_department_0) IS NOT NULL AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM nested_department_1) IS NOT NULL AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM nested_employees_0) IS NOT NULL AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM nested_employees_1) IS NOT NULL) AS "_e"))
